# PERF-81 negative: slice is chunked and the result is pre-allocated
lang: go
file: PERF-081-safe.go
---
package sample

import "github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"

type User struct {
	ID    int64  `db:"id"`
	Email string `db:"email"`
}

func FindByIDs(db *sqlx.DB, ids []int64) ([]User, error) {
	const chunk = 500
	users := make([]User, 0, len(ids))
	for i := 0; i < len(ids); {
		end := i + chunk
		if end > len(ids) {
			end = len(ids)
		}
		var part []User
		if err := db.Select(&part, "SELECT id, email FROM users WHERE id IN (?)", ids[i:end]); err != nil {
			return nil, err
		}
		users = append(users, part...)
		i = end
	}
	return users, nil
}
